field_values.action_summary: John Carter performs a dangerous climb up the exterior of the massive Zodangan barracks. He uses a grappling hook to reach the roof, subdues a sentry, and hangs him over the edge to buy time. He successfully retrieves two air machines from the machine sheds.
field_values.camera_intent: Extreme wide shots (building scale); POV shots (climbing perspective); Medium action shots (sentry struggle); Close-ups (grappling hook, air machines)
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Vertical height/scale perception relative to ground
Wind direction and intensity on exterior surfaces
Position of the incapacitated sentry hanging over edge
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH023_SC002

## Production Intent
Execute a high-stakes vertical infiltration and theft sequence. The scene must emphasize the extreme height of the Zodangan barracks to establish danger, transitioning from the physical struggle of the climb to the tactical subdual of a sentry and the successful retrieval of equipment.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- zodangan_sentry

## Required Environments
- zodanga_urban_complex (specifically exterior wall, roof edge, and machine sheds)

## Continuity Constraints
- Vertical height/scale perception relative to ground
- Wind direction and intensity on exterior surfaces
- Position of the incapacitated sentry hanging over edge

## Beat List
- BT001: The climb up the exterior wall
- BT002: Subduing the sentry
- BT003: Hanging the sentry to buy time
- BT004: Retrieving the air machines
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
